_comment: Full dragon progression: fresh world to Ender Dragon defeat. Single agent.

dragon_full_run.goal: Defeat the Ender Dragon. Use !dragonProgression to run the full automated sequence, or manually chain: !getDiamondPickaxe → !buildNetherPortal → !collectBlazeRods(12) → !collectEnderPearls(12) → !locateStronghold → !defeatEnderDragon.
